event.name: Creative Recycling Crafts Workshop
event.description: Join us for a fun outdoor workshop where we will transform recyclable materials such as plastic bottles, cardboard, cans, and old fabric into creative handmade decorations and useful crafts. This family-friendly event promotes sustainability, creativity, and teamwork while helping reduce waste in our community. All basic materials and tools will be provided, but participants are encouraged to bring clean reusable items from home.
event.location: Main Entrance, Magic Water Circuit Park

minigame.name: Eco Sort
minigame.description: Sort waste into the correct bin.

minigame.name: Water Saver
minigame.description: Avoid wasting water in a quick game.

quest.title: Turn off unnecessary lights
quest.description: Check the rooms at home and turn off any lights you are not using. This small habit reduces energy use and helps protect the planet.

quest.title: Unplug unused chargers
quest.description: Find chargers that are plugged in without charging a device and unplug them. Avoiding standby power waste also makes a difference.

quest.title: Use natural light to study
quest.description: Use daylight to study, read, or work. Open curtains and organize your space so you rely less on artificial lighting.

quest.title: Reduce screen time for one hour
quest.description: Take a one-hour screen break. You will save energy and give your eyes and mind a useful rest.

quest.title: Turn off the faucet while brushing your teeth
quest.description: Turn off the faucet while brushing your teeth. This quick action prevents several liters of water from being wasted each day.

quest.title: Take a five-minute shower
quest.description: Try to finish your shower in five minutes. Getting ready before turning on the water helps reduce waste without making it complicated.

quest.title: Complete Water Saver
quest.description: Play Water Saver and show that you can avoid wasting water. You can play again anytime to improve your score.

quest.title: Reuse water for a plant
quest.description: Reuse clean water to water a plant. Small decisions at home can give a valuable resource a second use.

quest.title: Separate paper and cardboard
quest.description: Separate paper and cardboard from other waste. Keeping them clean and dry makes recycling easier.

quest.title: Clean a container before recycling it
quest.description: Rinse or clean a container before recycling it. A clean container has a better chance of returning to the recycling cycle.

quest.title: Complete Eco Sort
quest.description: Play Eco Sort and practice placing waste in the correct bin. You can repeat it to improve your score.

quest.title: Identify three recyclable items
quest.description: Look around and identify three items that can be recycled. Recognizing them is the first step toward sorting them better.

quest.title: Daily quest - 2026-05-07
quest.description: Use a reusable bottle during the day. Avoiding one disposable bottle helps reduce single-use waste.

quest.title: Daily quest - 2026-05-07
quest.description: Walk or ride a bike for a short trip. Sustainable mobility reduces emissions and can make your routine more active.

quest.title: Daily quest - 2026-05-07
quest.description: Avoid using a plastic bag on your next purchase. Bringing a reusable bag helps reduce unnecessary waste.

quest.title: Daily quest - 2026-05-07
quest.description: Share an eco-friendly action you did today with someone else. Talking about these habits can inspire more people.

quest.title: Wash clothes with cold water
quest.description: Wash clothes with cold water when possible. This saves energy and can also help protect some fabrics.

quest.title: Save energy together
quest.description: Turn off unused lights and appliances with friends. Small coordinated actions make the habit easier to keep.

quest.title: Five-minute shower team
quest.description: Invite friends to take shorter showers today and compare progress as a group.

quest.title: Recycling squad check
quest.description: Work with friends to identify recyclable items and prepare them correctly before disposal.

activity.description: Turn off the faucet while brushing your teeth
Take a short trip without a car
Tell a friend about an eco action
Use cold water for one laundry load
Take a shower under five minutes

community_post.content: My family and I organized a beach cleanup this weekend. We collected 45 kg of waste.
I completed 7 days without using single-use plastic at home.
I completed the plastic reduction challenge for 30 days. I removed almost all plastic from my home.
